## Summary

Upgrades the Evaluation Report download endpoint so PDF/DOCX/TXT exports are professional author-facing artifacts instead of thin technical dumps.

## Changes

- Prefer canonical `evaluation_artifacts` (`evaluation_result_v2` / legacy `evaluation_result_v1`) for downloads, with inline job result as fallback.
- Add professional report metadata:
  - manuscript title
  - report type
  - genre / shelf where available
  - submitted word count
  - estimated manuscript pages at 250 words/page
  - generated timestamp
  - overall score and verdict
  - confidentiality note
- Improve PDF cover page and branding:
  - clean cover page
  - quiet `Powered by RevisionGrade™` cover footer
  - interior `RevisionGrade™ Evaluation Report · Confidential · Page X` footer
- Remove author-facing machine residue from exports, including underscored dialogue mechanism terms.
- Add truncation guard for summary text so known broken fragments like `lean on extend` do not ship in downloadable reports.
- Expand long-form Narrative Synthesis export content beyond only the executive verdict:
  - Market Shelf
  - Structural Stack
  - Arc Map
  - Revision Plan
- Add technical metadata at the end instead of foregrounding Job ID on the cover.
- Preserve TXT and DOCX utility exports while making PDF the prestige artifact.

## Scope

Download/export route only. No evaluation scoring, pipeline, database schema, Revise, TrustedPath, or public page copy changes.

## Manual verification checklist

- Complete long-form job downloads PDF successfully.
- Complete long-form job downloads DOCX successfully.
- Complete long-form job downloads TXT successfully.
- Exported summary does not include `lean on extend` or other visibly truncated ending.
- PDF does not include dashboard chrome, buttons, nav, approval states, or browser URL artifacts.
- PDF cover includes title, report type, word count/page estimate where available, score, verdict, and confidentiality language.
- Interior PDF pages use quiet RevisionGrade footer branding.

## Notes

I could not execute the app test suite from the connector environment. The branch contains a surgical route-only implementation for CI to validate.
